minting_now.name: Crown Morphs | Sovereign Reborn
minting_now.description:
👑 Crown Morphs | Sovereign Reborn

For ages, the Crowns had been sleeping.
Not gone… only waiting.

Hidden in darkness, the Sovereign 300 remained as whispers of power—unfinished and unrealized. The time had not yet come. The worthy had not yet risen.

But something has changed.

A fracture in the u

minting_now.name: LE DRAGON DE L'ILE DE RHODES
minting_now.description:
My study on the legend of the dragon of Rhodes through the lens of Schiller's corresponding ballad "Der Kampf mit dem Drachen" from the first edition of the Book Le Dragon de l'île de Rhodes of 1829, by Retzsch.

" It  is so told ,that there was a dragon on the island of Rhodes in the  1330s, hiding

minting_now.name: Scarlet Tengu Guardian#003
minting_now.description:
A fearless guardian born from Japanese folklore and modern street culture.
Scarlet Tengu Guardian represents rebellion, protection, and untamed spirit.
The bold crimson mask, sharp black shadows, and electric turquoise accents create a powerful balance between tradition and urban energy.
This piece

minting_now.name: Oddities NFT
minting_now.description: 2345 off the oddest little monsters you'll ever see on any chain with one of the most exciting roadmaps in 2026. 155 traits across the collection with 40 never seen before across any colletion on anychain. Fun, vibrant and as we say "Be Bold, Be Weird, Be You"

minting_now.name: "Faces"  ICONICMOMENTSNFT
minting_now.description: Faces is a collection of 99 unique 1/1 digital portraits by New York artist Michael Hafftka, spanning over fifty years of his artistic practice. Works range from analog paintings from the 1970s and 80s to recent digital and animated pieces, offered together for the first time as a limited edition di

minting_now.name: The Unlikely Kin
minting_now.description: From the absolute silence of the deep cosmos, two unlikely forms emerge, not as enemies, but as timeless companions. "Cosmic Kinship" captures the essence of a friendship that transcends definition. On the left, a luminous being of cerulean stardust—a vibrant, swirling entity of pure light. On the r

minting_now.name: Pixel Portals
minting_now.description: Whether a roaring vortex of fire, a serene gateway of water, or a quiet window to the deep cosmos, every portal offers a passage to an unknown world.

minting_now.name: Tiny Turtles
minting_now.description: A collection of 10,000 hand drawn cute turtles on Base

minting_now.name: Aurora Goldwing
minting_now.description: Aurora Goldwing, the Lucky Golden Egg, shines as a timeless emblem of hope and faith. Forged from pure golden light, it carries within its radiant shell the promise of endless possibilities and renewal. The delicate crown upon its head symbolizes inner strength and the belief that every dream, no m

minting_now.name: Hope Beyond Pain
minting_now.description:
This collection is not an art, it’s a story, a reality and a call for humanity.
2 weeks ago, a heartbreaking accident changed a woman’s life forever. She lost her husband and her little child in a bad accident and she herself is now fighting through severe spinal injuries. 

She is my neighbor and r

upcoming.name: NPC S0CIETY
upcoming.description:
NPC Society 🥸

a collection built around a simple idea:
the world is scripted

most follow it
a few break it

NPCs exist within the system
Main Characters challenge it

roles, progression, and community decide everything

6068 supply
free mint

not all will break the script
